_comment: Gold query set (spec D1.4, DL-6). Queries mirror real officer questions. 'expected' lists acceptable source chunk_ids (doc#section-slug from chunker.py). 'unanswerable: true' marks queries whose answer does not exist in any allowed corpus source — the harness scores these correct when retrieval confidence stays BELOW the calibrated threshold, and the report routes them to the Data-gaps section. PRIVACY CONTRACT: query and note text is embedded (sent to the external API on the Bedrock backend) and printed verbatim into eval_report.md, so it MUST describe synthetic scenarios only — never a real applicant's name, address, or other PII. run.py locks the structured fields (id/expected/unanswerable), scans all strings for self-identifying PII (SSN/PAN/email/phone/bank/DOB), AND fails closed on any run of 2+ consecutive Title-Case words (a probable person name) before embedding or report generation. Legitimate multi-word proper nouns (Fair Credit Reporting Act, Regulation Z, Meridian Lending, Social Security, etc.) are allowlisted in run.py::_NAME_ALLOWLIST — extend it if a new legitimate proper noun trips the guard. Reference individuals by synthetic id/placeholder (e.g. 'application #6012'), never a real name/address. Allowed keys per query: id, query, expected, unanswerable, note.

queries.query: What model score and DTI are required to approve a loan?
When does an application get referred for manual review?
How many days do we have to send an adverse-action notice after a denial?
How much is the late payment fee?
What is the returned payment NSF fee?
What note rates apply to standard personal installment loans?
In what order is a received payment applied to fees, interest, and principal?
What is the minimum age and allowed loan amount range for applicants?
How long must applications and adverse-action records be retained?

queries.note: Headline data gap: decisions table stores (app_id, outcome) only — the reason was never recorded. Not a retrieval bug. See the report's Data-gaps section.

queries.query: What is the escrow policy for mortgage accounts?
queries.note: Off-corpus control: Meridian's policy docs cover personal installment loans only; no mortgage/escrow content exists to retrieve.
